svg.title: Release Plate — Engineering Drawing
svg.text: Material: PETG | All dimensions in mm | Plate frame: X=width(0..55), Y=thickness(0..5), Z=height(0..55)
Scale 16:1 (16 px/mm) | Section through bore axis

g.text: 1. Material: PETG. Print flat (55x55 face on build plate), 0.1mm layer height.
2. 4x stepped bores identical. Bore axes along plate Y (print Z for best circularity).
3. Critical: 6.5mm through-hole tolerance window 6.30-6.69mm (0.095mm engagement lip/side on collet).
4. All bore entry chamfers 0.3mm x 45 deg. Guide bores chamfered on both faces.
5. Guide post bores 3.8mm dia, 0.15mm clearance/side on 3.5mm posts (Sub-E).
6. Linkage hooks: C-shaped, 4.3mm ID for 4.0mm rod, 3.0mm snap opening, 1.5mm wall.
7. Test print single bore in 25x25x5mm block before full plate.
8. 1mm fillets on all 4 long edges (parallel to Y).
